title: Booster Configuration
description: Configuration for gobooster git hooks manager. See: https://github.com/TerrorSquad/gobooster

execution.description: Repository-wide execution defaults applied to all hooks and tools.

default_backend.description: Default execution backend. 'ddev' runs commands inside the DDEV container (vendor/bin/ resolved inside container). 'host' runs on the host machine.

tool_timeout.description: Global tool timeout, e.g. '300s', '5m'. Empty means no limit. Overridable per-tool.

cache.description: Enable run cache globally. Tools with cache=true skip execution when input file hashes are unchanged.

parallel.description: Run tools within a hook concurrently. Can be overridden per hook.

members.description: Glob patterns for monorepo member directories, e.g. ['packages/*', 'apps/*'].

hooks.description: Git hook configurations, keyed by the git hook name.

enabled.description: Whether this hook is active. Set to false to disable without removing the config.

parallel.description: Run tools in this hook concurrently. Overrides [execution].parallel for this hook only.

tools.description: Named tools to run for this hook. Keys become the tool name shown in output and used for SKIP_<NAME>=1.

policy.description: Commit message validation policy. Applies to commit-msg and prepare-commit-msg hooks.

command.description: The executable to run. For type='php', resolved from vendor/bin/. For type='node', resolved from node_modules/.bin/. For type='system', uses PATH directly.

args.description: Arguments passed to the command before any file arguments.

type.description: Determines how the command binary is resolved. 'php' → vendor/bin/, 'node' → node_modules/.bin/, 'system' → PATH.

backend.description: Override the execution backend for this tool only. Defaults to [execution].default_backend.

extensions.description: Only run this tool when staged files with these extensions are present. Empty = run for all staged files.

include_patterns.description: Glob patterns to further filter which staged files are passed to the tool.

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns for staged files to exclude from the tool's input.

pass_files.description: Pass matched staged file paths as arguments to the command. Default: true. Set to false for whole-project tools (e.g. phpstan, jest).

run_per_file.description: Run the command once per matched file instead of once with all files as arguments. Useful for tools that only accept a single input (e.g. php -l).

restage.description: Re-stage matched files after the tool runs. Use this for auto-fix tools (prettier, ecs, rector) so fixes are included in the commit.

on_failure.description: 'stop' (default) aborts the hook immediately when this tool fails. 'continue' logs the failure but runs remaining tools — use for non-blocking/informational tools.

group.description: Logical group name shown in output (e.g. 'lint', 'format', 'analysis', 'test', 'artifacts'). No functional effect.

when.description: Conditional expression controlling when this tool runs.

cache.description: Cache this tool's result by hashing its input files. Skips execution if inputs are unchanged since last successful run.

check_args.description: Arguments to use in place of 'args' when booster runs in --check mode (read-only, no fixes).

check_fail_if_output.description: In --check mode, treat any stdout output as a failure (useful for diff-based tools).

depends_on.description: Names of tools in the same hook that must complete before this tool starts (parallel mode only).

commitMessagePolicy.description: Rules for validating and automatically modifying commit messages.

conventional_commits.description: Enforce Conventional Commits format: 'type(scope): description'. Valid types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert.

append_ticket_footer.description: Automatically append a ticket footer (e.g. 'Closes: PRJ-123') derived from the branch name. Does nothing if no ticket ID is found.

require_ticket.description: Fail the commit if no ticket ID (e.g. PRJ-123) is found in the branch name.

footer_label.description: Label to use for the ticket footer line. Default: 'Closes'. Change to 'Fixes', 'Refs', etc. to match your project convention.

validate_branch_name.description: Validate that the current branch name matches branch_pattern before allowing the commit.

branch_pattern.description: Regular expression the branch name must match when validate_branch_name is true. Skipped branches are exempt.

skipped_branches.description: Branch names that bypass ALL commit-msg validation (conventional commits, branch name check, ticket footer). Typically your long-lived branches.

prepend_ticket.description: Prepend the ticket ID to the commit message subject. For use with the prepare-commit-msg hook only.

skip_on_merge.description: Skip policy application for merge commits. For prepare-commit-msg hook.

skip_if_present.description: Skip prepending the ticket ID if it is already present in the commit message. For prepare-commit-msg hook.
